mission.title: surrealdb: Feature: Indexing & Query Planner
mission.description: Feature: Indexing & Query Planner. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current surrealdb setup
steps.description:
Verify your surrealdb version and configuration:
```bash
surreal version
```
This feature requires a working surrealdb installation.

steps.title: Review surrealdb configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Is your feature request related to a problem?

SurrealDB is a database. Together, indexes and query planners are the typical techniques used to speed up the execution of queries.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Feature: Indexing & Query Planner
steps.description:
## What is the motivation?

This will enable users to index and search documents using full-text capabilities.

## What does this change do?

This PR implements the indexing part.

This is the main TDD test:

https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/blob/f7bdd078f15e1e7a1a335af9cbe50a40f1f33c31/lib/tests/define.rs#L964-L973

This SQL script do the following:
- creates two documents
- create an index, triggering the indexing of both documents
- create a third document, indexed synchronously.
-

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Feature: Indexing & Query Planner" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## What is the motivation?

## What does this change do?

prerequisites.description: A working surrealdb installation or development environment.
